ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHAPED_GLASS.descriptio: Upon pickup, Enchant all Attacks in your Deck with [gold]Design[/gold] and lose half your Max HP.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHAPED_GLASS.flavor: As the sharpness of the edge drives you, it also makes you brittle.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHAPED_GLASS.title: Shaped Glass
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-STARSEED.description: Upon pickup, obtain [blue]5[/blue] [gold]Rare[/gold] card rewards. Add [red]Egocentrism[/red] to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-STARSEED.flavor: It sounds like two brothers, chasing glass frogs in the sun.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-STARSEED.title: Starseed
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHARED_DESIGN.descripti: At the end of combat, you may remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your deck if you took no damage.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHARED_DESIGN.flavor: Through flawless design, you may seek perfection.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-SHARED_DESIGN.title: Shared Design
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLAWLESS_HAMMER.descrip: Add [blue]Break Beneath Me[/blue] to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLAWLESS_HAMMER.flavor: Elegant design. Heavy mass. A drop of blood. Yes, this will do perfectly.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FLAWLESS_HAMMER.title: Flawless Hammer
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_SCEPTER.descrip: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] ALL [gold]Strikes[/gold] and [gold]Defends[/gold] into [blue]Perfected[/blue] versions.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_SCEPTER.flavor: The crystal pulsates with powerful energy as you pick it up.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ANCIENT_SCEPTER.title: Ancient Scepter
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FRACTURED_BLADE.descrip: After your first turn, take an extra turn. Whenever you play a card on your first turn, lose [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FRACTURED_BLADE.flavor: A massive crack runs down the length of the blade.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-FRACTURED_BLADE.title: Fractured Blade
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-PILLAR_OF_MASS.flavor: Mass is simple. The base of all forms, shaped and molded. Take this, and create your own vision.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-PILLAR_OF_MASS.title: Pillar Of Mass
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ARTIFACT_OF_COMMAND.des: Choose any [blue]1[/blue] non-special card to add to your deck.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-ARTIFACT_OF_COMMAND.fla: "Take a sip of the drink, and the mind becomes malleable....and the world around you follows your example." - Sigibold the Drunken
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MONSOON_CHARM.descripti: All combats drop an additional relic. Rest Sites are replaced with Elites.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MONSOON_CHARM.flavor: Rain pours down on your head. You feel a sense of dread as you hold it.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-MONSOON_CHARM.title: Monsoon Charm
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EULOGY_ZERO.description: Relic rewards are replaced with random non-Neow [gold]Ancient[/gold] relics.
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EULOGY_ZERO.flavor: "Architect...your death is fated. When you die - and you WILL die - I will be ready. I have been patient for millennia. This Spire...is mine."
ANCIENTSAWAKENED-EULOGY_ZERO.title: Eulogy Zero
